location.office_time_required: occasional work at an Airbnb office or attendance at offsites, as agreed to with your manager

secondary_archetype: Generalist PM with developer platform focus

level_signals: 8+ years of product management and/or product marketing experience
3+ years of product management experience designing and building developer platforms
Comp range $194K-$239K base, consistent with Senior/Staff IC at Airbnb
Entrepreneurial track record of taking an idea to reality and leading teams

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 8+ years of product management and/or product marketing experience.
3+ years of product management experience designing and building developer platforms.
Demonstrated empathy for key developer pain points, and a track record of leadership in building products for developers.
Passionate about improving developer productivity, product quality, and automating/optimizing developer workflows.
Experience building strategic relationships with partner executives, senior management and technical staff to achieve business goals.
Experience creating product messaging and delivering to customers and the media.
Demonstrated inbound and subject matter expertise.
Be able to build compelling customer-focused stories and work with marketing and communications partners to bring them to life.
Demonstrated track record of product leadership in a cross functional environment.
Entrepreneurial track record of taking an idea to reality and leading teams through a dynamic environment.
A strong ability to effectively use data and perform business analysis to support product strategy/decisions.
Strong ability and desire to travel frequently, including domestic and international.
we ask that you are able to work Pacific Time Zone work hours as needed.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Enjoys doing individual contributor product management work and staying in the details.
Excited to drive execution across teams in a fast-paced environment.

scope.surface: API platform for hosts and developers; developer-facing tools and partner integrations
scope.business_model: B2B2C — API platform enabling partners and developers to build applications on Airbnb supply/demand
primary_metrics_inferred: Number and quality of partner integrations
core_responsibilities: Develop and maintain a product vision, strategy, and roadmap for the API platform.
Synthesize feedback and translate it into product features.
Develop a public and developer facing messaging and narrative for the API platform.
Align product teams and cross functional partners.
Develop partnerships with a focus on supply and demand.
Role model behaviors that encourage open communication and curiosity.
Make judgements and prioritization decisions that are in the best interests of our users.
Efficiently execute to ship products and deliver impact for our business and users.

compensation.equity_form: equity mentioned as potential component alongside bonus, benefits, and Employee Travel Credits

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed and competitive ($194K-$239K base)
Remote-US eligible with flexible office attendance
Clear product surface with ownership of API platform strategy end-to-end
Explicit inclusion and disability accommodation commitments
Bonus, equity, and Employee Travel Credits mentioned as additional compensation
red_flags: Requirement to work Pacific Time Zone hours may disadvantage candidates in Eastern time zones
Must live in a state where Airbnb has a registered entity — some states excluded, and the exclusion list is evolving
Visa sponsorship status is unclear — not explicitly addressed in the JD
The 8+ years requirement combined with 3+ years specifically in developer platforms is a narrow pool filter
Travel requirement (frequent, domestic and international) is stated as a hard requirement but could be burdensome

fields_inferred_not_stated: scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly stated in JD)
scope.business_model (inferred from API platform context for partners and hosts)
location.work_auth (inferred as no-sponsorship; JD does not explicitly state sponsorship policy but restricts to states with Airbnb entities and does not mention visa)
location.visa_sponsorship set to unclear — not stated in JD
ambiguities: The JD lists both 'product management' and 'product marketing' experience in the 8+ year requirement — it is unclear whether PM experience alone would satisfy this or whether marketing experience can substitute; treated as combined/interchangeable.
'ic_pm_work_preference' and 'fast_paced_execution' bullets are unconditional in the JD but read as cultural fit signals rather than hard qualifications — classified as soft/nice-to-have.
Visa sponsorship not mentioned; work_auth set to 'no-sponsorship' is an inference based on the US-entity restriction language.
The JD notes the role 'may also be eligible for bonus, equity' — equity is conditional, not guaranteed.
